blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,129 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
